GB 38450一2019
Foreword
National Standardization Administration is in charge of this English translation， In case of any
doubt about the contents of English translation, the Chinese original shall be considered authorita-
tive.
This standard is drafted in accordance with the rules given in the GB/T 1. 1一2009 Directives for
standardlization一Part1: Structure and dra1ing of sitandards.
This standard was proposed and prepared by National Standardization Administration .
